Ibn Khaldun's First Book Has Been Translated into Turkish by Iber Publications

13.06.2022

The first book of Ibn Khaldun which was written at the age of 19, "Lubâbü'l-Muhassal fî usûli'd-dîn" was translated into Turkish for the first time.

The book, which was published by Iber Publications with the title "Kelâm ve Felsefenin Ana Konuları", was translated by Abdüssamet Sarıkaya, a research assistant at the Faculty of Islamic Sciences.

The book can be obtained from selected bookstores and online book sales websites.
